code:
journey
    title Release train and automation factor
    section Localhost development
			Coding: 1: developer
			Linting: 6: hook
			Building: 6: hook
			Commiting: 3: developer
		section Review
      Linting: 6: Pipeline
      Building: 6: Pipeline
      Deploying: 4: Pipeline
			Probing: 4 : manager, quality team, product team
    section Staging
      Linting: 6: Pipeline
      Building: 6: Pipeline
      Deploying: 6: Pipeline
			Probing: 3 : Ops, tech leads, quality team, product team
    section Production
		  Linting: 6: Pipeline
      Building: 6: Pipeline
      Deploying: 6: Pipeline
			Probing: 3 : Ops, tech leads, manager, quality team
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们想画一个发布列车和自动化因子的旅程图，展示代码从本地开发到上线的完整流程。整体分为四个阶段：Localhost development、Review、Staging和Production。
明白了，四个主要section。先确认Localhost development阶段的活动——Coding、Linting、Building、Commiting这四个活动对吗？评分和参与者怎么定？
对，Coding和Commiting由developer主导，评分低一点，1分和3分；Linting和Building是hook自动做的，给6分。
好的，本地开发阶段已添加。接下来Review阶段，Linting、Building、Deploying都由Pipeline执行，Probing需要manager、quality team、product team参与，评分分别是6、6、4、4。
elements_involved: Probing: 4: manager, quality team, product team

cscw_dialogue.utterance: Staging和Production的结构类似，但Probing的参与方有变化。Staging的Probing加入Ops和tech leads，评分降到3分；Production再加manager进来。
elements_involved: Probing: 3: Ops, tech leads, quality team, product team
Probing: 3: Ops, tech leads, manager, quality team

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 确认一下，Staging和Production的Linting、Building、Deploying都是Pipeline执行且都是6分吗？还有Production的Probing是Ops、tech leads、manager、quality team四方？
elements_involved: Probing: 3: Ops, tech leads, manager, quality team

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 没错，Pipeline自动化环节都是满分6分。Production的Probing确认是四方参与，product team在正式环境不直接参与探测。
elements_involved: Probing: 3: Ops, tech leads, manager, quality team

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 完成，整个发布列车旅程图已构建完毕，从本地开发的低自动化评分逐步过渡到生产环境的全Pipeline自动化。
